name: harvester
version: v5 — re-built using Tripo3D-AI v2 generation as visual reference: all-wood truss tower + horizontal turbine-style rotor with 8 long propeller blades, no outer ring
purpose: Erstes und meistgebautes Gebäude — extrahiert Energie aus dem Boden des Hex. Sitzt auf einer base_plate. Animierter Rotor (rotiert um Z-Achse — horizontale Wheel-Plane).

HV_FoundationRim.shape: Top rim, r=0.70, h=0.025 — wider than post-corner distance 0.636 so posts sit firmly

HV_Posts.shape: 4 inward-tapered square wooden beams (base 0.45, top 0.20 from center, height 1.30)
HV_Posts.material: mx_wood_posts (wood_planks_dirt × warm tint 1.05/0.85/0.65) — ALL WOOD now (v4 had silver steel, v5 is all-wood like the AI inspiration)

HV_Braces.shape: 3 levels of X-pattern wooden cross-braces (24 diagonal struts total)
HV_Braces.note: VColor floored to 0.7 minimum to compensate for AO=0 bug on thin diagonal cubes

HV_AxleSupport.shape: Small steel cube 0.10×0.10×0.14 sitting on the platform — only metal piece besides foundation
HV_AxleSupport.rationale: Mimics the AI v2 inspiration which had a small grey block under the rotor

HV_Rotor.shape: Horizontal turbine rotor: vertical steel axle + small yellow hub + 8 long propeller-style wooden blades + small yellow dome cap
HV_Rotor.blade_orientation: horizontal plane (wheel face = up); blades are radial
HV_Rotor.pivot: Origin set to (0, 0, 2.33) — top of axle support box
HV_Rotor.anim_empty: anim_spin_z (PLAIN_AXES at pivot) — Three.js rotates HV_Rotor around Z-axis

polyhaven_textures_used: wood_planks_dirt (1k → 512 diffuse) — only texture used; tower posts, braces, platform, rotor blades all get different tints of this same texture

material_tint_family.mx_wood_posts: (1.05, 0.85, 0.65) on wood_planks_dirt — warm wooden tower beams
material_tint_family.mx_wood_braces: (0.85, 0.70, 0.55) on wood_planks_dirt — darker aged wood for X-braces

render_pipeline: Flat-shading + Cycles AO bake → vertex color Col → Texture × VColor MULTIPLY in materials. MeshBasicMaterial-tauglich für Three.js.

techniques_applied: Posts (4) + Braces (24) + Rotor (12) joined to single meshes
One shared diffuse texture across all wood parts (different per-material tints)

threejs_runtime_hints.rotor_animation: scene.getObjectByName('HV_Rotor').rotation.z = t * 0.8  // ~0.8 rad/s spin around vertical axis
threejs_runtime_hints.anim_empty: anim_spin_z empty marks the pivot. HV_Rotor's origin already set to it, so direct rotation.z works.

design_lineage.v4: 12-blade wagon-wheel rotor on tall steel mast, vertical wheel plane, mixed wood/steel tower
design_lineage.v5: 8 long propeller blades on horizontal plane, all-wood tower with small steel axle support block — re-built with Tripo3D AI v2 generation as visual reference (see _aigen/harvester_aigen_v2_topview.png for source inspiration, kept locally only, not in repo)
